title: Achilleon Prompt
description: A parameterised prompt template loaded by SDK consumers. Different from a skill (fixed system prompt for a slash command) — prompts take user-supplied values and render a final prompt string at call time. Lives at prompts/{id}.yml.

id.description: Lowercase, hyphen-separated. Must match the filename (without .yml). 2-40 characters.

name.description: Human-readable name shown in docs and pickers.

description.description: One-line description of what the prompt does.

template.description: The prompt body. Placeholders use {{variable}} syntax. Every placeholder must have a matching entry in `variables`; the validator enforces this.

name.description: Variable name as it appears in the template ({{name}}). snake_case.

description.description: What the variable is for. Shown in docs + used by SDK tooling.

required.description: If false, the SDK renderer allows omission (empty string is substituted).

default.description: Default value substituted when a required variable is missing but a default is provided.

tier.description: Recommended T1 tier this prompt runs well on. Consumers can override.
